nasb.text: ‘And whatever nation to which they will be in bondage I Myself will judge,’ said God, ‘and after that they will come out and  serve Me in this place.’

esv.text: ‘But I will judge the nation that they serve,’ said God, ‘and after that they shall come out and worship me in this place.’

cnv.text: 神又說：‘奴役他們的那個國家，我要親自懲罰。以後，他們要出來，在這地方事奉我。’

ccb.text: 但我必惩罚奴役他们的国家，之后你的子孙要离开那里，在这片土地上事奉我。’

csbs.text: 可是我要惩罚那奴役他们的国家。’ 神又说： ‘这些事以后，他们将要出来，在这地方事奉我。’
